arts.ttl: Elon Musk buying Liverpool would be like seeing your dream home bulldozed - he is everything this city cannot stand and even if he made every ticket free I would never sit on the Kop again, writes DOMINIC KING
arts.sum: COMMENT BY DOMINIC KING: It felt a bit early for April Fool's Day but, lo and behold, Musk's father, Errol, went on Times Radio on Tuesday afternoon to set out his son's wish.

arts.ttl: I hate Trent Alexander-Arnold talk - his head's not in Madrid, it's at Liverpool
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been defended by Tim Sherwood after the Liverpool right-back was criticised for his performance against Manchester United

arts.ttl: Ange: Even Salah would struggle at Tottenham
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has said that even Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah would struggle in his Tottenham side.

arts.ttl: Ange: Even Salah would struggle at Tottenham at the moment
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has claimed even Mohamed Salah would struggle in his Tottenham side despite the Liverpool forward's red-hot form in front of goal.

arts.ttl: Tottenham get fresh Newcastle handball verdict as controversial VAR decision takes another twist
arts.sum: Despite the ball hitting Joelinton's hand in the build-up, match official Andy Madley let it slide and wasn't referred to a pitch-side check. Head of Premier League refereeing body PGMOL, Howard Webb, has explained the process in which Anthony Gordon's goal for Newcastle United was allowed to stance against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou reveals why even Mohamed Salah would struggle at Spurs
arts.sum: Postecoglou defends Heung-min Son, insisting Spurs’ selection problems are so bad that high-flying Liverpool talisman couldn’t flourish

DM: Rodrigo Bentancur - Absent at the weekend after a fresh suspension, Bentancur's return could be significant against Liverpool. Defensive absentees have been notable in recent months, with Spurs' 6-3 defeat to the Reds before Christmas highlighting the lack of organisation and solidity within the rearguard.

Liverpool can take a step closer to defending their Carabao Cup crown and winning a first piece of silverware under Arne Slot when they visit Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday. He's provided three assists in his last three for the Reds, splitting Man Utd's defence with an excellent pass as Liverpool equalised at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Cup win in adversity could be springboard for Tottenham – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Spurs face Liverpool in the Carabao Cup semi-final, with the first leg in north London on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou backs misfiring Son and says even Salah would struggle at Spurs
arts.sum: Manager highlights context of Son’s poor form Tottenham have interest in PSG forward Kolo Muani Ange Postecoglou has backed Son Heung-min to rediscover his best form and suggested even Mohamed Salah would struggle in the current Tottenham team. Son, who has seen Spurs trigger their one-year option on his contract to tie him down until the summer of 2026, goes into Wednesday night’s Carabao Cup semi-final first leg at home to Liverpool with an unforgiving spotlight on his performances.
